title: Brevo Email Event
description: Represents a webhook event payload delivered by Brevo when an email interaction occurs, including delivery status changes, opens, clicks, bounces, and spam reports.

event.description: Type of email event that occurred.

email.description: Recipient email address associated with the event.

date.description: UTC date-time when the event occurred.

messageId.description: Unique identifier of the email message that triggered the event.

subject.description: Subject line of the email message.

tag.description: Tag assigned to the email for categorization and tracking.

sendingIp.description: IP address of the server used to send the email.

ts.description: Unix timestamp in seconds when the event occurred.

ts_epoch.description: Unix timestamp in milliseconds when the event occurred.

reason.description: Reason for the event if applicable, such as bounce error codes or spam filter details.

link.description: URL of the link that was clicked, present only for click events.

templateId.description: ID of the template used for the email if applicable.

campaignId.description: ID of the marketing campaign if the event is for a campaign email.

TransactionalEmailEvent.description: Event payload specific to transactional email events.

MarketingEmailEvent.description: Event payload specific to marketing campaign email events.
